base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: improve selected objective by changing entry quality/profile selection without starving trades
expected_effect: Expected to reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst/average MAE and exposure from delayed high-extension pin recoveries while retaining most of the 34-trade, $1261.5 profile edge. Reject if total net profit falls below 98% of run_029, protected extended-VWAP winners are materially cannibalized, completed trades fall more than 10%, or pullback_long/squeeze_long throughput is affected.
label: charm-pin-local-extension-box
rationale: This uses a single profile-specific strategy-profile family, not global veto tightening or take-profit compression. run_029/run_037 are the best anchors with 107 trades, $7149.6 net profit, and no slow >=12h trades, but the current risk-adjusted bottleneck is hidden MAE from charm_pin_pullback_long. Global hidden signatures retain only about 79-84% PnL or leave worst MAE unchanged, and prior RSI-boundary surgical veto lost score without improving worst MAE. A local charm-pin dynamic-extension box is the least invasive config-only test aligned with the strategist plan: preserve pullback, squeeze, charm-wall, and 1DTE edges while probing the high-extension charm-pin tail.
strategy_plan_next_experiments: Dormant Charm Wall Pin-Avoid Router Split
